title: CYP2C9 pharmacogenomic variant — celecoxib context (CPIC)
summary: rs1297714792 is a pharmacogenomic variant in CYP2C9 relevant to celecoxib and acenocoumarol dosing per CPIC level A guidelines.
riskSummary: CYP2C9 variant with altered function (see guideline) — celecoxib dosing may require adjustment
detail: CPIC level A guideline covers CYP2C9 and celecoxib, acenocoumarol, fluvastatin, meloxicam.
whyItMatters: CPIC guidelines provide evidence-based recommendations for adjusting drug therapy based on pharmacogenomic results.
release: CPIC API variant and pair data
notes: Consumer arrays may not cover all alleles needed for a complete CPIC phenotype call.
Medication changes require clinical review and confirmatory testing.
